info.title: Lucid Web Craftsman — Supabase Edge Functions
info.description: GENERATED by scripts/openapi-edge-functions.mjs. Do not hand-edit; run npm run openapi:edge-functions. Optional per-function detail: supabase/functions/<name>/openapi.fragment.json

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer JWT or anon key (Supabase client).

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: Supabase anon (or service) key; required for functions.invoke.

application/json.description: JSON body per function implementation; add openapi.fragment.json for detail.

post.description: Requires valid CSRF headers from the storefront. Prices are verified server-side; see create-payment/lib/checkout-schema.ts.

post.summary: Create PayPal order from verified cart

parameters.description: Bearer JWT or anon key (Supabase client).

parameters.name: apikey

parameters.name: x-guest-id
parameters.description: Guest session id for order ownership checks.

get.description: Invoked as GET https://<project>.supabase.co/functions/v1/generate-sitemap (unless overridden). See supabase/functions/generate-sitemap/index.ts. Uses GET; body usually empty.

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: Supabase anon (or service) key; required for functions.invoke.

post.summary: Resolve order from signed email token

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer JWT or anon key (Supabase client).

parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: Supabase anon (or service) key; required for functions.invoke.

200.description: found and order snapshot or found=false

token.description: Signed token from order confirmation link

order_reference.description: Optional CMD-... reference; must match token

post.summary: Look up order by Stripe Checkout session id
post.description: Invoked as POST https://<project>.supabase.co/functions/v1/order-lookup (unless overridden). See supabase/functions/order-lookup/index.ts.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer JWT or anon key (Supabase client).

200.description: found=false hides unauthorized rows; otherwise order subset
